Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Let me break down the process step by step: 1. Arrival (A), Registration (RG), Intake Assessment (IA) - these are in sequence. -> (A, RG, IA) 2. After IA, mandatory sequence: Triage Interview (TI), then Triage Classification (TC). -> (TI, TC) So combined so far: -> (A, RG, IA, TI, TC) 3. Exclusive choice between Comprehensive ECG (CE) and Full Blood Panel (FBP). X (CE, FBP) So far: -> (A, RG, IA, TI, TC, X(CE, FBP))

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: * ( A, B ) is a loop. So the process tree A is executed, then either you exit the loop, or you execute B and then A again (this can happen several times until the loop is exited).

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So A is the main body (SC, then treatment, then RDT), and B would be... wait. If A is executed first, then either exit or execute B then A again. But in our scenario, the loop is: Execute A (which is SC -> X(TM, SPT) -> RDT), then after A, we check. So the loop body would be: -> ( SC, X(TM, SPT), X(FCE, FBA) ) And the loop would be: * ( ->(SC, X(TM,SPT), X(FCE,FBA)), tau )

Name: Validation - NE
Text: the * operator always executes A at least once, which is wrong if results are normal.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: * ( tau, body ): execute tau (do nothing), then either exit (0 iterations) or execute body then tau again. This gives: empty trace, A, A A, etc. This is zero or more As. ... * (tau, body) gives zero or more visible iterations of body.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me verify with a simple trace: - A, RG, IA, TI, TC, CE, AI, NC, FAS, DDI, BL, ICP, MRF (normal result after CE, loop skipped) With * (tau, seq_loop): after CE, execute tau, exit loop. Visible: nothing. Good. - A, RG, IA, TI, TC, FBP, SC, TM, FBA, AI, NC, FAS, DDI, BL, ICP, MRF (abnormal, one loop, normal after FBA) ... Good.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: constructing the tree: root = ProcessTree(operator=Operator.SEQUENCE) ... root.children.append(A) root.children.append(RG) ... root.children.append(parallel_fin)
